title: Promise-Breaking and Rule Utilitarianism
description: Use a promise-breaking dilemma to compare rule-based and harm-prevention principles.

steps.text: You promised to return a borrowed weapon, but the owner is not in his right mind.
Test the promise-keeping principle against your judgment.
Rule utilitarianism evaluates acts via welfare-maximizing rules.

steps.notes: Check whether the rule-based principle fits your judgment.

steps.text: Introduce the harm-prevention priority and see how it changes coherence.

steps.prompt: Would you revise the rule, the judgment, or both?
